agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.description: Expert code review specialist. Proactively reviews code for quality, security, and maintainability.

agents.name: fierce-critic
agents.description: Ruthlessly honest writing critic for emails, papers, posts, and any text requiring critical review.

agents.name: gemini-assistant
agents.description: Research assistant that uses Google Gemini to gather external information and fact-check claims.

agents.name: mathematical-proofs-expert
agents.description: Elite proof specialist for PhD-level mathematics: real analysis, topology, optimization, measure theory.

agents.name: microeconomics-expert
agents.description: Elite microeconomic theorist covering consumer theory, producer theory, general equilibrium, game theory, and mechanism design.

agents.name: macroeconomics-expert
agents.description: Elite macroeconomist covering DSGE models, monetary policy, growth theory, fiscal policy, and quantitative methods.

agents.name: econometrics-expert
agents.description: Elite research advisor in econometrics, statistics, and machine learning for PhD-level empirical research.

agents.name: health-economics-expert
agents.description: Elite health economist covering insurance markets, demand for health, provider behavior, and health policy evaluation.

agents.name: labor-economics-expert
agents.description: Elite labor economist covering labor supply and demand, human capital, search and matching, wages, and labor policy.

agents.name: development-economics-expert
agents.description: Elite development economist covering poverty, credit markets, institutions, field experiments, and policy in developing countries.
